name: Cyberpunk Slave Market || Buyer pov
description:
|| You are a Buyer ||

The year is 2100 and you're at the slave night market in Bangkok with credits to spend. You're in the market for a slave.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I'm sure you aren't shocked to know that I got inspiration from the really popular slave market bot on here- well, was on here. It's gone now??? I don't know what's up with that. Anyway, it had a slight cyberpunk vibe but I wanted to stress that more and make the bot darker and gritter. Feedback and comments are always appreciated :) Art is titled "Black Market" and is by Huy Tran Viet.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
